scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,password-reset,attendance,super-admin,data-portal,reports,auditing -c blue,magenta,cyan,yellow,green,red,white "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix services/password-reset run dev" "npm --prefix services/students-attendance-service run dev" "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 4000 --app-dir services/super-admin" "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 4002 --app-dir services/data-portal" "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 4003 --app-dir services/reports" "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 4004 --app-dir services/auditing"
scripts.start: concurrently -n server,password-reset,attendance,super-admin,data-portal,reports,auditing -c blue,magenta,cyan,yellow,green,red,white "npm --prefix server start" "npm --prefix services/password-reset start" "npm --prefix services/students-attendance-service start" "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 4000 --app-dir services/super-admin" "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 4002 --app-dir services/data-portal" "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 4003 --app-dir services/reports" "python -m uvicorn app.main:app --port 4004 --app-dir services/auditing"
